strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise directly matches the primary tech stack requirements
Fullstack breadth spanning APIs, frontend frameworks, databases, and cloud infrastructure across many production systems
AI/LLM and MCP integration experience at re:cinq aligns with the nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Grossly overqualified: 15+ years of Staff/Senior-level experience for a Junior/Mid entry-level position signals likely misalignment in expectations and compensation
Currently based in Lagos, Nigeria — the role explicitly requires high on-site presence, making logistics a critical unresolved blocker
No PostgreSQL or NestJS listed; database experience leans toward MongoDB and MySQL, which are not the preferred stack
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is technically strong and his stack overlaps meaningfully with the role's requirements, but he is a Staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience being evaluated for a Junior/Mid position — this mismatch in seniority almost certainly means misaligned salary expectations and a risk of rapid disengagement. Compounded by his current location in Lagos against a high on-site presence requirement, the practical barriers to a successful placement are substantial regardless of technical competence.
